chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 823 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.3478/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.3479/2023 (Ex./A) 4. For orders on CMA No.3480/2023 (Stay/A) 5. For hearing of main case 10.05.2023 Petitioner Gul Hassan, present in person..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency application is granted. 2 to 5. Adequate remedy is available to the petitioner for redressal of his grievances under SPPRA Rules; hence, this petition being not maintainable is dismissed along with listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
